title: AssessmentAction
description: A published Tax Commission action reducing an assessment or reclassifying a property — the outcome record. Canonical schema reconciling the 'Assessment Actions' Open Data dataset (4nft-bihw, 8 columns), published under the Office of Administrative Tax Appeals (OATA). Reductions are expressed in total actual assessed value. Keyed on Tax Year + Borough/Block/Lot.

grantedReductionAmount.description: 'Granted Reduction Amount' — total actual assessed-value reduction granted.
